name: Rolly Balls 2021
description: Rolly Balls is a relaxing casual game you can pick up and play any time! Simply rotate the level by dragging your finger over the screen. Rotate the level in the correct way to get all the balls to fall out of the level! Complete enough levels and you can be awarded more balls to increase your score even furthur!
